div1.entryFree:
Uneasy, 1) difficult: this swift business I must u. make, lest too light winning make the prize light, Tp. I, 2, 451. from whose simplicity I think it not u. to get the cause of my son's resort thither, Wint. IV, 2, 56.
2) incommodious, uncomfortable: upon u. pallets stretching thee, H4B III, 1, 10. u. lies the head that wears a crown, H4B III, 1, 10
